title: Job Opening Hotel Manager at Menzies Aviation India

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Hotel Manager at Menzies Aviation India
jsonLd.description:
We at Menzies Aviation India are looking for an experienced Hotel Manager based out of Jaipur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Menzies Aviation India:
Menzies Aviation India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Revenue Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Menzies Aviation India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
